---
title: "Harriet Spratt"
---

## Harriet Spratt

**Dates:** (July 1821-May 1895)

### Description

CMY's maid

### Biography

She was the daughter of Charles Spratt, shepherd. [information from Barrie Spratt]

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 23d [1893?]
- Letter from 7 June 1892
- Letter from October 10, 1891[[footnote:1]]
- Letter from June 7th 1890
- Letter from [1878?]
- Letter from Easter Eve [30 March 1872]
- Letter from Sept 13th [1871]
- Letter from August 9. [1869]
- Letter from August 5 [1869]
- Letter from September 30, 1868
- Letter from May 16th 1860
- Letter from October 1, 1857
- Letter from Monday 17th April [1854]
- Letter from February 23, 1853
- Letter from Wednesday 5 [December 1838]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
